tool_input.command:
cat /home/tie303177/work/nabledge-dev/.claude/worktrees/395-add-md-section-links/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-database.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
for s in data.get('sections', []):
    sid = s.get('id')
    title = s.get('title', '')
    # Print sections related to dynamic SQL, variable conditions
    if any(k in title for k in ['可変', '動的', 'in句', 'IN', 'SQL', '概要', '使用方法', 'like', 'order']):
        content_preview = s.get('content', '')[:200]
        print(f'=== {sid}: {title} ===')
        print(content_preview)
        print()
"
tool_input.description: Read libraries-database.json sections for dynamic SQL

tool_input.command:
cd /home/tie303177/work/nabledge-dev/.claude/worktrees/395-add-md-section-links/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries && python3 -c "
import json
with open('libraries-database.json') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
for s in data.get('sections', []):
    sid = s.get('id')
    title = s.get('title', '')
    keywords = ['可変', '動的', 'in句', 'IN句', '概要', 'like', 'order by', 'SQL', '機能概要']
    if any(k in title for k in keywords):
        content = s.get('content', '')[:300]
        print(f'=== {sid}: {title} ===')
        print(content)
        print()
"
tool_input.description: Read database.json sections for dynamic SQL
